style_effects: Intense molten lava glow radiates from Mr. Mime's body, with ember sparks drifting upward in erratic, fiery patterns. A crackling crimson aura pulses around his form, casting warm amber light that casts long, dancing shadows. The air shimmers with heat distortion, and smoke trails curl lazily from his limbs as he moves. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
